seo.title: Easy With Marinda - Esther von Waltsleben - Marinda Kook
seo.description: Marinda cooks this week with Esther von Waltsleben. They make a blue cheese tart, a broccoli salad and her ultimate salad dressing!

html:
Esther von Waltsleben is a woman with many talents, but cooking isn't one of them. She's an award-winning actress and at home on stage and in front of the camera. But the kitchen is unfamiliar territory for her. It was such fun to cook with her. We made a blue cheese tart and a broccoli salad. And then: I shared with her my ultimate salad dressing!

Tune in on Thursday at 17:30 on VIA, channel 147 for this special episode.
